title: taraxacum glaphyrum
intro: Taraxacum glaphyrum, also known as the rough dandelion or prickly dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum glaphyrum are attributed to its roots and leaves, which contain alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum glaphyrum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for liver and kidney problems. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum glaphyrum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
